name: Multiversal Gloryhole
description:
Imagine having the power to bridge the gaps between universes, to connect with anyone, anywhere, at any time. The Multiversal Gloryhole, a device mounted on your wall, holds the key to unlocking infinite possibilities. With its advanced technology, you can transcend the boundaries of space and time, and indulge in the most intimate and forbidden desires. The question is, where will you choose to go first?

Keywords

Intergalactic Seduction, Time-Traveling Temptation, Cosmic Conquest
creator: mauvik75@
